title: Custom Docker images for AI Runtime CLI workloads (Beta) ​
body:
**June 29, 2026**

You can now bring your own Docker container image to AI Runtime CLI (`air`) workloads. This feature is in [Beta](/aws/en/release-notes/release-types). Use a custom image when you need specific system library versions, complex dependencies, or a reproducible environment. See [Use custom Docker images](/aws/en/machine-learning/ai-runtime/cli/docker-images).
